title: Egypt + Jordan + Israel itinerary — Petra, Alexandria, Jerusalem, taxi scams
html:
Egypt + Jordan + Israel itinerary — Petra, Alexandria, Jerusalem, taxi scams

Source: 2023-09-06 Apple Note. The mid-trip operational notebook for the Sept 2023 Jordan/Israel/Egypt trip referenced in the 2023 travel summary. Real-time entries from on the ground.

TL;DR

  • Multi-city itinerary: Petra (half-day + full day) → Jerusalem (half + full) → Amman → fly to Egypt → Alexandria (Bibliotheca, Qaitbey castle) → Cairo (pyramids).
  • Costs captured: $25 Egypt visa, $50 Petra entrance.
  • Catalog of Egyptian taxi-driver scams: cancel ride after pickup, "I work for the government" credibility play, photo-then-tip harassment, secret ride-cancel + charge more on arrival — "general - take advantage if I can culture."
  • Jerusalem hit-list: Old City via Jaffa gate, Church of the Holy Sepulcher, Dome of the Rock, Garden Tomb, Yad Vashem, Machane Yehuda market, Gethsemane Garden, Tomb of the Virgin Mary.
  • Gift list for the boys back home: hookah, mom/dad/Valeria/Paige, Jo (later cancelled per the Jo breakup).

Pattern observed

Yahir's travel-mode notebook: granular per-day plans + cost tracking + scam taxonomy. Same format appears for Vietnam and the Chengdu trip the next year. The taxi-scam catalog reveals his anthropological pattern-matching instinct firing in real-time.

Open questions

  • Did he successfully avoid all four Egyptian taxi scams listed?
  • The "Karam el sham" mention — restaurant or person?
